heroCredit: Charles from Port Chester, New York / CC BY 2.0
description: The Audi RS3, produced from 2011, is powered by Audi's iconic 2.5-litre five-cylinder turbo engine producing up to 400 bhp. Available as both Sportback and Saloon, it combines compact dimensions with extraordinary straight-line performance. The distinctive five-cylinder soundtrack is its calling card.
